exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
    toks = rec['name'].casefold().strip().split()
    ap = toks[1] if len(toks) >= 2 else toks[0]
    return f"{ap}|{rec['region'].casefold()}"

print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "region": "Cusco"}))

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]

def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]

print(clerical_queue(pairs))

er, rel = 0.9, 0.1
evidence_score = round(0.6 * er + 0.4 * rel, 2)
conflict = abs(er - rel) > 0.5
unc = "high" if conflict else "low"
print(f"evidence_score {evidence_score} | uncertainty {unc} | note señales conflictivas")
